message:
fix(test-runner): Remove buggy file tracking - was causing SIGILL crash

The atomic file tracking code (commit ffba8ee0) was causing SIGILL crashes
when running tests in the thread pool. The crash prevented any tests from
running and CI reported false success.

Root cause: The current_file atomic tracking was buggy and crashed.

Fix: Reverted to simple watchdog without file tracking. The watchdog will
still timeout after 5min and report that codegen hung, just won't identify
the specific file (can bisect manually to find it).

This fixes the immediate CI issue - tests will now actually run instead of
crashing silently.
